---
title: "test_pennyone_cli_empire.ts"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/tests/empire_tests/test_pennyone_cli_empire.ts"
loc: 34
complexity: 2
logic_score: 4.07
style_score: 3.83
intel_score: 1.40
overall_score: 4.39
---

## Intent
A functional component of the Corvus Star static analysis matrix. It exists to support the broader ecosystem of system telemetry. Its role in the system is to provide foundational operational logic.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 4.1/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.8/10
- **Intel [I]**: 1.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 6 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [describe](file://node:test)
- [it](file://node:test)
- [*](file://node:assert)
- [spawnSync](file://node:child_process)
- [*](file://node:path)

### Exports
- `CLI_PATH`
- `result`
- `output`
- `result`
- `output`
- `result`
- `output`
